description: Guest checkout flow allowing purchases without account creation
acceptance_criteria: Add product to cart without logging in (guest session).
Navigate to Cart page and verify 'Checkout as Guest' button with data-testid='guest-checkout'.
Enter guest email and required billing info in form with data-testid='guest-form'.
Complete purchase and verify order created without user account in database.
Verify order confirmation email sent to guest email with data-testid='guest-order-email'.
Verify guest can view order status via email link with unique token (data-testid='order-lookup').
Verify guest cannot access order history page (/dashboard) without authentication.
Verify guest checkout validates email format and required fields.
Verify security: guest cannot access other users' orders via ID manipulation.
Verify option to convert guest order to registered account post-purchase with data-testid='create-account'.
